{{Quote|The Reb...ellion is bigger...more important than...you. Than m--|Bobek's final words|<ref name="Vader's Quest 2">[[Vader's Quest 2|''Vader's Quest'' 2]]</ref>}}
'''Bobek''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dubravan]] from [[Dubrava/Legends|Dubrava]].

==Biography==
[[File:BobekShot-VQ.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Bobek shot by a stormtrooper]]

Bobek sought to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and met with [[Jal Te Gniev]] in a local [[Unidentified bar (Dubrava)|bar]]. While drunk and angry, Gniev blindfolded Bobek and had him run over a trap door in the boardwalk near the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], plunging him into the swampy water below. Bobek went home in tears, disillusioned by the act of cruelty.

The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] presence on Dubrava began flexing its muscle when [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] began seeking [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and it became known that a [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilot]] was on Dubrava. A firefight [[Attack on a Dubravan bar|erupted]] and [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] set the cantina on fire, intending to burn everyone alive. Gniev managed to escape the massacre, only to encounter a pair of stormtroopers. Bobek arrived at the last moment and killed one of the troopers but was himself fatally shot by the other one. Gniev drowned the second trooper and returned to Bobek, who admitted to buying the [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] to kill Gniev.

Bobek's selfless act of defiance against the Imperial troops inspired Gniev to reevaluate his priorities and to save Skywalker from Vader on the planet [[Jazbina/Legends|Jazbina]].
